title: Create with Friends
description: A Create-based modpack to be played with friends
body:
A simple modpack to play with friends, featuring Create, Immersive Engineering, and Refined Storage. The pack adds a curated selection of mods intended to add technical concepts in a vanilla-like style.

The pack is intended to be lightweight and and approachable, perfect for modded Minecraft beginners and players on low-spec systems.
